stories.title: Run button + data-testid on AgentverseDrawer agent cards
stories.notes: Fixes latent E2E failure — data-testid was missing from agent cards

stories.title: AGENT_MATCH_FOUND card with Activate Agent / Fork & Customise CTAs
stories.notes: Differentiated from OPTIMIZATION_OPPORTUNITY — shows match score bar + two CTAs

stories.title: ReplayPreview component — step-by-step replay in sidebar chat
stories.notes: Steps animate in with 400ms stagger; confirm button appears after 1.5s

stories.title: Correction textarea sub-card embedded in ReplayPreview
stories.notes: confirm-correction action calls POST /api/agents/build with correction text

stories.title: Show Me postMessage bridge — host-page teach-me mode entry
stories.notes: r4mi:show-me → loader dispatches CustomEvent → React navigates to policy tab + sets demoMode

stories.title: Recording banner on host page during teach-me mode
stories.notes: data-testid=recording-banner; red bg; pulsing dot; pushes content down

stories.title: /kanban route with live story status board
stories.notes: Reads kanban.json on each request; auto-refreshes every 30s; dark sidebar aesthetic

stories.title: Voice narration in capture.js (teach-me mode)
stories.notes: SpeechRecognition API; step_description populated; null if unavailable

stories.title: Screenshots in teach-me mode via html2canvas
stories.notes: JPEG 0.6 quality; lazy-injected html2canvas; 500ms failsafe timeout
